---
title: "Men of the Time: A Dictionary of Contemporaries, containing Biographical Notices of Eminent Characters of both Sexes 7th edition"
---

## Men of the Time: A Dictionary of Contemporaries, containing Biographical Notices of Eminent Characters of both Sexes 7th edition

**Author:** G. H. Townsend
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** London: Routledge

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
